audit_items.proof_trace: The function calls reset_control_deassert(rst) then registers aspeed_peci_reset_control_release(rst) via devm_add_action_or_reset. The rst pointer originates from devm_reset_control_get (registered at devm slot N); the cleanup action is registered at slot N+1. Devm unwinds LIFO, so the action fires (calls reset_control_assert(rst)) before rst's own devm release — rst is always valid. On devm_add_action_or_reset failure, the action fires immediately while rst is still valid, and since the action was never successfully registered, it will not run again during cleanup; no double-free occurs.
